# FocusFlow — Deep Focus App Blocker for Windows
# https://focusflowpc.pages.dev/
# By TBTechs

## What is FocusFlow?
FocusFlow is a free Windows 10/11 desktop productivity application that enforces deep focus sessions by using real Win32 API calls to forcibly terminate blocked processes. Unlike browser extensions or soft timers, FocusFlow kills distracting applications at the OS level the moment they appear — no grace period, no workarounds.

## Key Features
- **Focus Launcher (Kiosk Mode):** Replaces the Windows desktop/taskbar with a locked, distraction-free workspace during sessions.
- **Real Process Enforcement:** Uses SetWinEventHook + 500ms polling and ProcessHandle.destroyForcibly() / taskkill /F to kill blocked apps instantly.
- **Nuclear Mode:** Blocks 30+ escape routes including Task Manager, PowerShell, CMD, Run dialog, and WSL.
- **Website Blocker:** Blocks domains at the hosts-file level, affecting every browser simultaneously without any extension.
- **Windows Firewall Rules:** Adds outbound netsh advfirewall rules for network-level app blocking.
- **PIN-Gated Breaks:** SHA-256 PIN required to take breaks or end sessions early.
- **Sound Aversion:** Plays an annoying tone every time a blocked app is attempted.
- **Block Schedules:** Recurring time windows where apps are automatically blocked (e.g. social media blocked 9am-5pm weekdays).
- **Daily Allowances:** Time budgets per app (e.g. 30 min YouTube/day).
- **Keyword Blocker:** Blocks any window whose title contains a keyword.
- **Pomodoro + Custom Timer:** Session lengths from 5 min to 4 hours.
- **Habit Tracker:** 7-day streak grid linked to focus sessions.
- **Task Manager:** Full CRUD with priorities, due dates, recurring rules, and Windows alarm notifications.
- **Stats & Reports:** Focus streaks, session history, temptation log charts, and weekly focus reports.
- **Daily Notes:** Private journal linked to session data.
- **Crash-Safe Design:** Taskbar restored via 4 independent safety layers even if the app crashes.

## Privacy
FocusFlow collects zero personal data. All data is stored locally in a SQLite database at %USERPROFILE%\.focusflow\focusflow.db. No account required. No internet required. No analytics. No data ever leaves the device.

## Tech Stack
- Language: Kotlin 1.9.22
- UI: Compose Multiplatform Desktop 1.6.1 (Material 3)
- Native: JNA 5.14 (Win32 APIs — user32.dll, kernel32.dll)
- Database: SQLite via org.xerial:sqlite-jdbc
- Build: Gradle 8.14.2, GraalVM CE 19
- Packaging: jpackage → EXE, MSI, MSIX (Microsoft Store)
- CI/CD: GitHub Actions (windows-latest)

## Supported Languages
English, Spanish (Español), French (Français), German (Deutsch), Japanese (日本語), Chinese Simplified (中文简体), Korean (한국어)

## Downloads
- Microsoft Store: https://apps.microsoft.com/detail/9NJN9FPRQ7T1
- Direct EXE: https://github.com/TITANICBHAI/FocusFlow-jvm/releases
- Android version: https://focusflowapp.pages.dev
